notes: Generates a minimal Vite webapp with importer-scoped lockfile labeling and Buck/Nix integration.
Includes a default nix_node_test target (unit) using Vitest; opt out of sample tests with --no-tests.
Use pnpm dev for HMR. Production builds are hermetic via Nix + Buck.
Local workspace TS dependencies can be imported directly in dev mode; the generated Vite config allows reads from the repo workspace root.
When local dependencies are linked with workspace:/link:/file: specs, the generated Vite config excludes them from optimizeDeps prebundling to preserve live source updates.
If local dependency edits do not refresh, confirm the dependency spec is workspace:/link:/file: and restart dev after any package.json change.
SSR alternatives: webapp-ssr-express for framework-neutral SSR, webapp-ssr-next for Next app-router SSR.
